text: Would you like to go to the cinema?
Why do not we go to a concert?
Yes, I would love to. That sounds good!
Hi, Erica! Would you like to go to the cinema tonight?
That sounds good! But I am a little busy tonight.
No problem. Let us go on Friday. There is a concert.
A concert? Yes, I would love to. Can my sister join us?
Of course! She can join. Let us meet at seven.
Perfect. Friday at seven. Thank you for the invitation!
Sorry, I am busy. Maybe next time.

Hello. I want to invite my friend tonight. Listen to me. I am going to call her. I will say: Hi! Would you like to go to the cinema with me? There is a nice movie tonight. Maybe she is busy. Maybe she will say: Sorry, I am busy tonight. But maybe she will say: Yes! That sounds good. I would love to join you. I hope she can come. It is more fun together. Let us see what she says.

Hi. Let me tell you about my evening. My colleague invited me to a concert. He said: Would you like to come to a concert on Friday? I was very happy. I said: Yes, that sounds good. I would love to join you. But then I remembered. On Friday I am busy. So I had to refuse. I said: Sorry, I am busy on Friday. Maybe next time. He understood. Next week we are going to go to the theater together. I will not refuse that one.

First, my friend asks: Would you like to go to the cinema tonight? Second, I answer: Yes, that sounds good. Third, my friend says: Great. Let us meet at seven. Fourth, I ask: Can my sister join us? Fifth, my friend says: Of course. The more, the better.
Would you like to go to the cinema?
Yes, I would love to. That sounds good!
Would you like to join us?
There is a concert on Friday.
Sorry, I am busy. Maybe next time.
